text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sitting in the cafeteria and thinking hard
about tomorrow's training, when...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Uerghhh! This homework is so hard!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Enough to make you cry?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Calm down, Ticket. Use reason to solve it, not
emotion.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
O-okay, that makes sense. Let's all figure this out
together!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm leaving. I already did mine.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WHAT?! Already?! Am I that far behind?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What are you having trouble with? Let's look at
that problem first.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hold on! My head feels as mushy as turf on a
rainy day!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What am I having trouble with? I don't even know anymore!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...There's no hope for her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm... As long as you snap out of your confusion
and focus, it's really not that hard.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The only time she isn't confused is when she's
running.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, that's it! You're right, Taishin. Quick,
Ticket. Start running!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What? Run? Yay! ...Are you sure, though?
Shouldn't I be studying?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Go on. Take a lap at full speed and clear your
head.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Well, whatever works.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A little while later...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm baaaaack!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wow, there's a sparkle in her eye all of a sudden.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Mm, looks like she's back to normal. Now, sit
down.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Start with the practice problem. Read it clearly
and think hard before you answer.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe this loudmouth is quietly reading
for once...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Yes, that's correct. Seems like running
really does help you concentrate.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But for each question? There's no way that'll work
during a test.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We can worry about that later. This is good for
now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. You're always too nice to Ticket, Hayahide.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're one to talk. For all your complaining, I
notice you're still sticking around for moral
support.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?! It's not like I...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks, you two! I finally found a way to
focus!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay! Now help me get through the rest too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...Less talking, more studying. C'mon, open your
book.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...The way you go full throttle always inspires us.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And yet you too seem to derive so much of your
energy from our support.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You truly are an enigma, Ticket.
